awsKey.description: AWS IAM access key ID with full access to the bucket and access to AWS STS.

awsSecret.description: AWS IAM secret access key matching the provided access key ID.

filesBucket.description: Name of the AWS S3 bucket used for files.

region.description: AWS region of the bucket (e.g. `us-east-1`). Required — used directly when constructing the S3 client and validating the connection.
